en: I know these things. Where are we?
Griffith Park. Where are we? I know.
I don't know. What do we do?
I don't think we can do anything, because when you get this.
ko: 우리는 아무것도 할 수 없을 것 같아.

en: If I get this. When you get this, you got to give it everything you got.
What are you going to do? I got to follow my own plan.
Stay here. Get my own thing going.
You're going to be in Paris. Good jazz there.
And you love jazz, then. Right?
